stemHtml: According to SERA, what documents shall a flight crew member carry when performing a flight?

options.a: A valid flight crew licence, a valid medical certificate and a form of photo ID.
options.b: A valid flight crew licence, updated time records, insurance records.
options.c: A valid flight crew licence, updated time records, a valid photo ID.
options.d: A valid flight crew licence, updated time records, passport, VISA.
